summary: This is an extremely brief post announcing the release of a new book by Fred Brooks, author of The Mythical Man Month. Joel simply links to 'The Design of Design' on Amazon. There is no analysis, review, or commentary — just a book announcement. The post consists of only 19 words of original content.
key_points: Fred Brooks, author of The Mythical Man Month, has published a new book called The Design of Design
Joel considers this noteworthy enough to announce but offers no review or commentary
money_quotes: There is a new book out by Fred Brooks (author of The Mythical Man Month)!
key_insight: A minimal announcement post highlighting Joel's respect for Fred Brooks as an influential software engineering author.
